## Summary

Briefly describe the change and the motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, and the full suite passes (`python -m unittest discover -s tests`).
- [ ] `ruff check plimsoll tests` is clean.
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (standard library only).
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG` updated where relevant.
- [ ] All claims in code, docs, and this description are accurate.
